productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Solid Brown Handbag
description: A perfect blend of practicality and style, this bag from lino perros comes in classic nailed pattern and has copious space to carry your essentials safely. Height: 24 cmWidth: 33 cmDepth:  12 cm Made of synthetic leather with a fabric inner lining Raised nubs on the outer for a nailed effect Rounded and padded short handles with buckled straps and brand badge on the front for style Long zipper for the main compartment that has a zippered pouch, zippered compartment and two organiser pouches One zippered compartment at the back Branded zippers and sliders for durability Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
